message:
fix(cli): keep repo .beads config when dolt_data_dir escapes

When metadata.json sets dolt_data_dir outside .beads, filepath.Dir(dbPath)
no longer points to the repo's .beads directory, causing the CLI to lose
port/database config and potentially auto-start a shadow server.

Add resolveCommandBeadsDir() that validates filepath.Dir(dbPath) against
the config, falling back to FindBeadsDir() when they disagree.

Fixes #2590.
